title: Exclusive: What's inside the Iran deal Trump is close to signing
snippet: Axios reports on the contents of a proposed 60-day MoU between the U.S. and Iran, including toll-free Hormuz passage, mine clearance, blockade lifting, sanctions waivers, and nuclear commitments under a 'relief for performance' framework.
tag_reason: 신규 — 60일 MoU 초안의 구체적 내용(호르무즈 통행료 면제, 기뢰 제거, 봉쇄 해제, 제재 면제, 핵 약속)이 처음 공개된 독점 보도
